assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.

developer_goal: Create a W&B account and run the official Python experiment until accuracy and loss are recorded for viewing in W&B.

first_success.outcome: The published mock training run records accuracy and loss in a W&B project.
first_success.observable_signal: wandb.ai shows a generated run with accuracy and loss changing across training steps.

route_selection.surface: W&B Models Quickstart through a first tracked training run
route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: Personal API key plus Python quickstart experiment
candidates.reason: Signup and authentication UI fields are client-rendered and not fully enumerated in public docs.

candidates.name: Service account API key route
candidates.reason: Requires an existing team or organization context beyond a fresh personal developer start.

required_path.action: Sign up and sign in to Weights & Biases.
required_path.observable_result: The developer has an authenticated W&B account.

required_path.action: Create a personal API key from User Settings.
required_path.observable_result: A personal API key value is displayed once.

required_path.action: Install wandb and authenticate the machine.
required_path.observable_result: Local environment is authenticated to W&B.

required_path.action: Run the quickstart training experiment that logs accuracy and loss.
required_path.observable_result: A run appears in the W&B project with logged metrics.

prerequisites.description: An API key is required to authenticate the machine with W&B.

platform_outcomes.description: W&B records the training run and metrics in the project UI.

excluded.reason: Different product surface from Models experiment tracking quickstart.

sources.title: W&B Models Quickstart (legacy path reference)
evidence_supported: Models quickstart peer URL from record

uncertainties.question: What exact authentication choices, fields, terms, and verification actions appear in current W&B signup?
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Dated fresh-account signup capture through first personal API key.
